ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the football club */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Country where the club is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the coach belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started their tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended their tenure */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "previous_club" TEXT /* Name of the previous club the coach managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the performance record */,
  "mvp" TEXT /* Most valuable player of the season */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position achieved in the season (e.g., winner, runner up) */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the club during the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the club in the season */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the club in the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played in the season */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Total matches won in the season */,
  "matches_drawn" INTEGER /* Total matches drawn in the season */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Total matches lost in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated in the season */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach during the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the club played in during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES national_leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the national league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_league_relationships" (
  "club_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the club started participating in the league */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the club stopped participating in the league (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_league_relationships_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES national_leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_league_relationships_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club the player is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the season */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the season */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
